name_full: Wideband transmission systems operating in the 2.4 GHz band
sector_applicability: Radio equipment vendors laboratories market surveillance authorities and wireless device manufacturers
why_it_matters: Defines harmonised radio requirements for wideband data transmission equipment in the 2.4 GHz ISM band supporting RED conformity assessment
notes: ETSI deliverable repository provides EN 300 328 V2.2.2

name_full: Accessibility requirements for ICT products and services
sector_applicability: Public-sector websites mobile applications ICT procurement product vendors and accessibility auditors
why_it_matters: Provides the harmonised European accessibility requirements for ICT products and services including web software hardware and telecommunications functions
notes: ETSI describes EN 301 549 as a harmonised European Standard for ICT accessibility

name_full: Intelligent Transport Systems - Vehicular Communications - Basic Set of Applications - Part 2: Specification of Cooperative Awareness Basic Service
sector_applicability: Connected vehicles roadside units ITS stations and transport infrastructure operators
why_it_matters: Defines cooperative awareness message services used by connected vehicle and intelligent transport systems
notes: ETSI deliverable repository provides EN 302 637-2 V1.4.1

name_full: Cyber Security for Consumer Internet of Things: Baseline Requirements
sector_applicability: Consumer IoT manufacturers certifiers regulators and product security teams
why_it_matters: Defines baseline cybersecurity and data protection provisions for consumer IoT devices and associated services
notes: ETSI deliverable repository provides EN 303 645 V3.1.3 after original TS publication

name_full: NFV descriptors based on YANG Specification
sector_applicability: Telecom cloud operators NFV vendors orchestrator developers and interoperability testers
why_it_matters: Defines key NFV SOL interface and descriptor material used for network service lifecycle interoperability
notes: ETSI deliverable repository lists NFV-SOL 003 versions through V5.3.1

name_full: Cyber Security for Consumer Internet of Things: Conformance Assessment of Baseline Requirements
sector_applicability: Consumer IoT test laboratories certification schemes manufacturers and conformity assessment bodies
why_it_matters: Provides conformance assessment methodology and test scenarios for ETSI consumer IoT cybersecurity baseline requirements
notes: ETSI deliverable repository provides TS 103 701 V2.1.1

sector_applicability: Mobile network operators equipment vendors 5G core implementers and interoperability testers
why_it_matters: Publishes the ETSI/3GPP system architecture specification for 5G networks and services
notes: ETSI deliverable repository provides TS 123 501 Release 18 V18.12.0
